title: Column chart - Green, grey, blue, red
excerpt:
My team is trying to design a progress chart using the column chart, but for some reason the completion doesn’t go right to left. 
it’s working right to left. 
How do we fix this? 
Thanks.

posts.author: adithya-krishna (Adithya Krishna)
